input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.1.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.1.4
            TITLE: reinspection

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.1.4: Reinspection
IN.1.4 Reinspection 
Officials may Reinspect any vehicle at any time during the competition  IN.15

final_answer: IN.1.4 Reinspection Officials may Reinspect any vehicle at any time during the competition IN.15
